name: Low Fat Carrot Cake Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
3. In another bowl, mix the cereal and milk; let stand for 3 minutes.
4. Stir in the carrots, sugar, egg, and oil into the cereal mixture.
5. Add to the flour mixture; stir just until moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
6. Stir in the raisins.
7. Spoon the batter into a muffin pan sprayed with vegetable cooking spray, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
